text: In .NET 11 Preview 4 and Visual Studio 18.8, VSTest stops flowing Newtonsoft.Json into your test projects. Tests that relied on the transitive copy fail with FileNotFoundException at runtime. The fix is one explicit PackageReference, and ExcludeAssets=runtime workarounds stop working since VSTest no longer ships the DLL.

ASP.NET Core 11 ships four rate-limiter algorithms in Microsoft.AspNetCore.RateLimiting: fixed window, sliding window, token bucket, concurrency. Wrong choice = either bots punch through your /login limit or real users 429 on legitimate bursts. The decision matrix, the partition-key trap behind reverse proxies, and why the default 503 status is wrong for public APIs.

The official ModelContextProtocol 1.2 C# SDK turns any method into an agent tool with [McpServerToolType] and [McpServerTool]. A working stdio server on .NET 11 in under 50 lines, exposing SQLite to Claude Code. Plus the stderr logging trick that keeps default ILogger from corrupting the JSON-RPC stream.

SearchValues<T> in .NET 11 is the fast path for ContainsAny / IndexOfAny / IndexOfAnyExcept on ReadOnlySpan, but only when you store it in a static readonly field. Build it inside the hot method and you keep all the SIMD planning cost while losing the amortisation. Plus the StringComparison gotcha (only Ordinal / Invariant variants) and when the inversion trick with IndexOfAnyExcept beats string.TrimStart.
